name: Pheasant Breast with Cinnamon Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-by-8-inch baking pan with heavy aluminum foil, leaving a 1-1/2 inch foil collar.
2. Wash pheasant breasts and pat dry. Arrange in prepared pan.
3. Melt butter in saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour and cinnamon until smooth.
4. Add orange juice to the saucepan. Cook until thickened, stirring constantly.
5. Add marmalade and bouillon. Continue cooking until thickened.
6. Stir in orange liqueur.
7. Spoon the sauce evenly over pheasant breasts.
8. Seal foil tightly around the pan.
9. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for tender pheasant.
10. After baking, spoon grapes and orange sections over the pheasant.
11. Bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes.
12. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
13. Serve with hot cooked rice.
